reviews.originalComment:
Lokasi Hotel ini sangat strategis, karena dekat dengan Masjid Raya Baiturrahman dan pusat Kota.
Kamarnya sangat bersih. Kamar mandinya pun bersih.
Menu sarapannya bervariasi tiap harinya.
reviews.reviewComments: The location of this hotel is very strategic, as it is close to the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque and the city center. The rooms are very clean. The bathroom is also clean. The breakfast menu varies every day.

reviews.originalComment:
My overall experience at this hotel was very good. The staff were welcoming and helpful, and the room provided a comfortable stay. The facilities were well-maintained, which made the visit enjoyable.

There were, however, a couple of areas that could be improved. The water supply in the morning was inconsistent, which may cause some inconvenience to guests. In addition, while breakfast was satisfactory, a wider selection of dishes would enhance the dining experience.

Despite these minor issues, I found the hotel to be pleasant and would consider staying here again in the future.
reviews.reviewComments:
My overall experience at this hotel was very good. The staff were welcoming and helpful, and the room provided a comfortable stay. The facilities were well-maintained, which made the visit enjoyable.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Un poco ruidoso. El baño perdía agua

reviews.originalComment: Puas banget nginep disini. Kamarnya bersih. Toilet bersih. Air nya, beeehhhhh, deras banget. Air panas nya juga berfungsi dengan baik. Pelayanan nya juga ramah. Lokasinya dekat dengan masjid raya, lapangan blang padang, kuliner dimana mana. Untuk harga segini, rekomended banget!!!!
reviews.reviewComments: I had a great time staying here. The room is clean. The toilet is clean. The water, wow, flows strongly. The hot water also works well. The service is friendly. The location is close to the grand mosque, Blang Padang field, and food options everywhere. For this price, highly recommended!!!!

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Wirklich alles war dreckig. Überall lagen Haare und es war sehr sehr schmutzig und staubig. 
Kann ich auf keinen Fall empfehlen.

reviews.originalComment:
Tempatnya stategus, bersih dan nyaman
Recommended bgt, bakal nginap dsini lagi klo ke banda
reviews.reviewComments: The place is strategic, clean, and comfortable. Highly recommended, I will stay here again if I go to Banda.

reviews.originalComment: Berdekatan dengan Masjid Rahman jarak lebih kurang 300m dan boleh berjalan kaki
reviews.reviewComments: Located near Masjid Rahman, about 300m away, and can be reached by walking.

reviews.reviewPositives: De locatie en het vriendelijke personeel. Bedden waren verder wel comfortabel.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
De kamer was vies. Het beddengoed, muren en hoofdsteun van het bed zaten onder de vlekken. Onder en achter het bed was het erg vies. Geen spiegel in de douche. 
Het ontbijt was niet lekker. Te weinig keus, mieren liepen overal, brood was oudbakken, koude koffie en thee.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel recomended yg dekat kemana mana , petugas ramah", semoga kualitas pelayanan nya tetap di pertahankan ,next kalau ada rezeki bisa kembali ke aceh, akan menginap disini lagi
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended hotel that is close to everywhere, friendly staff, hopefully the quality of service is maintained, next time if there is a chance to return to Aceh, I will stay here again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Ruime kamer, hoede locatie centraal, ontbijt mogelijk.Vriendeljjk personeel.

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel best dekat dengan masjid dan tempat untuk shopping. Keliling banyak kedai makan juga. Highly recommended!

reviews.reviewPositives: Goed hotel . Proper en confortabel. Heel vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel. Goede centrale ligging.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Ontbijt was in buffet vorm . Westerse viriatie was minder.

reviews.reviewTitle: Ask for a Renovated Room for the Best Experience
reviews.reviewComments:
I stayed at Hotel Garuda on my first and last day in Aceh. Initially, I booked a triple-bed room, but unfortunately I was given a room that had not been renovated yet. The condition was quite old and did not match the photos shown online, so it was a bit disappointing and not very comfortable.

When I was about to check out, I asked the staff if there were more comfortable rooms available. They informed me that renovated rooms were available, although not with the triple-bed setup. Before my return to Malaysia, I requested a queen-bed room instead, as I preferred a renovated room similar to the photos.

Alhamdulillah, the staff were very helpful and accommodated my request. My second stay was much more comfortable and matched my expectations. Overall, the service was excellent, but I would recommend confirming that you are getting a renovated room when making your reservation.

reviews.reviewPositives: the location was near masjid Raya Baiturrahman and food stall. u can just walk in to that masjid.

reviews.reviewComments: Puashati dekat dengan masjid baiturahman bole jalan kaki sekitar 3minit, kedai makan juga dekat.
Hotel near masjid raya baitul rahman which is provide very nice view. Great restaurant nearby easy access good transportation

reviews.originalComment: sangat di rekomendasikan untuk liburan keluarga,, hotel nya di tengah kota dan dekat kemana2. MANTAFFFF
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended for family vacations, the hotel is in the city center and close to everything. AWESOME!

reviews.reviewNegatives: sound of roof blown by wind, it has disturb my sleep

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi hotel sangat strategis... Apalagi dekat dengan Mesjid Baiturrahman... Staf sangat ramah 👍
reviews.reviewComments: The location of the hotel is very strategic... Especially close to the Baiturrahman Mosque... The staff are very friendly 👍

reviews.reviewPositives: The breakfast very nice and i like the locations because of nearly the pasar aceh and other outlet that provide me thing and meal

reviews.reviewTitle: the closest to the Masjid Raya
reviews.reviewComments:
great hotel, closest to the Masjid Raya.. 

the hotel still under construction for a better accomodations

reviews.reviewPositives: Easy to mosque masjid baitulmal Rahman.

reviews.reviewComments: Good location dekat dengan masjid dan banyak kedai di sekeliling. Hotel masih belum siap renovation, lift belum siap kena naik turun tangga tapi bag semua staff tolong bawakan. Bilik di side baru sangat nice, aircon sejuk memang highly recommended untuk stay hotel ni

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya nyaman,, resepsionis nya juga ramah sekali... pokoknya rekomended bgt.ttp dijaga kualitas pelayanan nya ya.mantaaap
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable, and the receptionist is very friendly... definitely highly recommended. Just make sure to maintain the quality of service. Awesome!

reviews.reviewTitle: Best place to stay in Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Close to Masjid Raya, Museum Tsunami Aceh which is walkable distance. Clean, just sometimes the TV is not working and in some room the Aircond is noisy.

reviews.reviewTitle: Very good hotel, affordable and good service
reviews.reviewComments:
Staff were very friendly although not all understand english, they try their best and assist. Food for breakfast was good Alhamdoulillah and had variety. Best part is it is 2min walk to masjid Baiturrahman, very convenient.
Many shops and restaurants nearby.
Can even order food via grab for delivery at hotel.

Downside: money changer is a bit far from the hotel but easily accessible via grab.

reviews.originalComment: Termasuk hotel yg lumayan mahal ratenya tapi tidak ada lift dan tidak gratis sarapan, tidak seperti hotel lainnya ada yg lebih murah tapi lift dan sarapan paginya free. Tapi staffnya ramah dan dekat ke masjid baiturahman, itu nilai plusnya
reviews.reviewComments: Including a hotel that has a fairly expensive rate but no elevator and no free breakfast, unlike other hotels that are cheaper but have elevators and free breakfast. However, the staff is friendly and close to the baiturahman mosque, which is a plus point.

reviews.reviewTitle: Great place to stay in Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Close to Masjid Raya, Museum Tsunami Aceh which is walkable distance. Clean, just sometimes the TV is not working and in some room the Aircond is noisy.

This hotel has a very high potential. The interior and furniture is very well choosed it just that the entire building is not properly build and maintain. The mold on the roof and wall is because of a very poor finishing and waterproofing. Rain water get into our room that we have to request for a few more floor mat. But I think most of the building in Aceh is like this. They are very creative in interior but very poor in building it. A lot of beautiful new mosque but already has a stagnant water problem because of uneven floor. The staff is very helpful very friendly. Breakfast is good. Location is excellent. There is a food stall and restaurant and also grocery store nearby. Walking distance to pasar aceh too and muzium tsunami. I read a comment that this hotel is under construction a year ago and its still under contruction during my stay. I dont see any work in progress happening I dont know why. I wish this hotel can finish their renovation soon. Its going to have 2 elevator if they finish the renovation. I think they are going to be an amazing hotel.
Excellent location and customer service. Need to speed up present renovation job and keep up the cleanliness.

Overall, the stay was acceptable but could have been better. The location is convenient, and check-in was smooth. Staff were polite and tried to be helpful when needed.

However, the hotel is currently undergoing renovation, and this did affect the experience. There was a noticeable fine dust and cement smell in some areas, especially in the corridors and occasionally in the room. While the room was generally okay, it felt a bit dated, and cleanliness could be improved, particularly given the ongoing construction. Noise insulation was also an issue at times.

This hotel is fine for a short stay if you’re out most of the day, but it’s probably better once the renovation is fully completed.

The hotel offers reasonable value for the price and has a practical location. Staff were friendly and responsive, which helped during the stay.

That said, the hotel is currently under renovation, and the smell of cement and fine dust was noticeable in certain areas. While the room was functional and generally clean, the ongoing works did impact comfort. Some areas also looked worn and in need of upgrading, which is understandable given the renovation.

Overall, it’s an okay option for budget travelers, but the experience will likely improve once renovations are completed.
staff was very nice. the receptionist are so nice and kind. surely i will stay here if come back to Aceh. clean room. good environment.

Great location, walking distance to many tourist attractions. The room was clean and the staff were very friendly. The only downside is the limited facilities had to wait quite long for the iron board, maybe because they only have one.
Superb hospitality from all staff especially the receiptionest during my arrival and departure. Great location near BaiturRahman Mosque. Will stay again for my next visit.

Kamar luas, lokasi strategis, staf responsif, TV sudah smart TV, sarapan menunya full karbo (nasi, mi, ayam, roti, kentang, bubur kacang ijo), sedang renovasi. Keseluruhan bagus dan recommended. Terima kasih.

Location :
1. Near Masjid baitulrahman
2. Near food amenities , easy to look for foods
Cleaniness:
1. Spacious
2. Clean & Wangi
Staff:
1. Friendly
2. Easy to communicate & helpful

The location is good. very close to the baiturrahman mosque and food stalls. There are also many shops selling clothes nearby. The staffs are friendly and we were allowed to check in early at 9.30 am. It is easy to get ehailing car service from this hotel. The negative things are, the hotel is quite old and the furniture also looks old. The level of cleanliness is also quite poor.

reviews.reviewTitle: Okay but much can be improved
reviews.reviewComments: Location is very, very near to Baiturrahman Mosque, just few minutes away by foot. But facility wise, much to improve. Renovation is in progress, we are told lift is yet to be available - so not suitable for folks with problem to use stairs. No toiletries provided, balcony is very unsafe for kids. TV provided but without remote. Breakfast not much variety and if u are late basically not much left. Staff is very friendly n helpful though. Price wise is cheap so u cant expect much.
Excellent location, nearby to places such as Grand Baitul Rahman mosque and eatery location.

reviews.originalComment:
Hotel sedang renovasi dan penambahan kapasitas sehingga sedikit berisik di siang hari. Letak strategis di tengah kota, 3 menit ke Blang Padang cocok utk jogging, 3 menit ke mesjid raya sekalian sholat shubuh. Tempat makan, ngopi dan cinderamata ada di sekitar hotel sangat membantu.

Kamar standar, bersih, wangi, aura hangat dikarenakan cat dinding dan perabotan warna kayu.

Lampu pijar bikin sakit mata, perlu penambahan lampu putih, dan lampu tidur.

TV besar konek ke Wifi, lemari pakaian terbuka lumayan membantu banyak rak kompartemen.

Wastafel sangat kecil, tidak ada sikat gigi, tidak ada sabun/sampo mandi, mungkin lupa di sediakan.

Sewaktu saya nginap tamu tidak sampai 10 kamar sehingga sarapan pagi diantar ke kamar (nasi goreng ayam).

Tidak disediakan air mineral tapi tersedia ketel listrik, gelas, sendok, gula dan kopi sachet.

Perlu ditingkatkan lagi layanan yg paling mendasar dikarenakan tamu dari luar daerah terkadang tidak membawa perlengkapan mandi.
reviews.reviewComments:
The hotel is undergoing renovations and capacity expansion, so it can be a bit noisy during the day. It is strategically located in the city center, 3 minutes to Blang Padang, suitable for jogging, and 3 minutes to the grand mosque for Fajr prayer. There are places to eat, coffee shops, and souvenirs around the hotel, which is very helpful.

The standard room is clean, fragrant, and has a warm ambiance due to the wall paint and wooden furniture.

The incandescent lightbulbs are harsh on the eyes; additional white lights and bedside lamps are needed.

The large TV is connected to Wi-Fi, and the open wardrobe provides quite a few shelves for compartments.

The sink is very small, and there are no toothbrushes or soap/shampoo provided, which might have been forgotten.

During my stay, there were fewer than 10 rooms occupied, so breakfast was delivered to the room (chicken fried rice).

Mineral water is not provided, but an electric kettle, glasses, spoons, sugar, and coffee sachets are available.

Basic services need to be improved, particularly because guests from outside the area sometimes do not bring their own toiletries.

reviews.reviewTitle: One of best hotel I’ve been in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: the staffs were helpful and friendly, the room we got was clean. and for matter fact it provided SmartTV for a good price doesn’t cross my mind at all. it was mind blowing that we had this access for me and my friend. but one thing was during our stays was wifi router problem. and our room was too far at the back. nevertheless it was all a good stay experience. definitely recommend for solo travellers!
The hotel was being renovated. Daytime was noisy but night time was ok since they stop work around 6pm.

Good hotel.
Easy to excess, good location and big room & good staff and very supportive.  Need to important location in city. 
Still under construction certain part and lift. 
Only need to consider extend one hrs.
Tq

The hotel seems new but the room interior less modern but then i love it. That's not a big issue. It's comfortable, clean and men staffs are nice and helpful. Everything is great but dont have iron at that time but it's ok lah i think they will provide sooner. I give 5/5 for this hotel.

This is a 3- storey budget hotel with no elevators. Toilet seat broken, with mouldy ceiling, and no shower gel despite the gel dispenser. 

We got the highest floor with a balcony. At night, the light at the balcony was so bright, and we were not able to turn it off as it was centralized. No curtains to cover it as well.

They have an iron for the whole hotel, but with no ironing board.

Although can’t complain much- the price is cheap anyways.


Pros- clean, cheap, and very near to the masjid (walking distance)

Aku amat berpuas hati dengan hotel ini. Mereka mengizin aku tinggal luggage ku kerana aku sampai awal ke sini dalam 9.30am. Berdekatan dengan masjid. Hotel yang selesa. Toiletries disediakan, aircond yang sejuk, tv yang ada sambungan internet.

reviews.reviewTitle: EXTRA CALUE FOR MONEY & EXCEPTIONAL STAFF
reviews.reviewComments: The location was great as it is close and walking distance to Masjid Raya Baiturrahman, Museum Tsunami and located in city center.  The price was very value for money when i got triple beds. The best thing is the staff was very polite, helpful and friendly especially that female staff at the counters.  Definitely will choose this hotel again when visits Aceh later.

very new with masjid raya,good location.easy to find food.
nice n friendly staff.
will stay again definitely

Semua kamar emg gaada king bed, yg ada hanya twin dan three bed. Resepsionis 3x mengganti kamar setelah di komplain karena tidak sesuai pesanan, kamar disebelah renovasi sehingga kebisingan ga terhindarkan, sprei banyak noda hitam, tidak ada breakfast, lokasi oke tapi fasilitas sangat kurang
Hotel generally OK. But their lift is not working yet and parts are still under renovation. All others pretty standard.
No lift. Undergo renovation when I was staying there. Maybe the new building got lift. Got a restaurant nearby. Walking distance to Mosque. Okay to sleep for short time. Easy to get grab.

Lokasi sangat dekat dengan Masjid Raya Baiturrahman.  Boleh jalan kaki dengan mudah dan aman untuk solat Subuh di masjid.  Highly recommended.  (Buat masa ini lif belum ada kerana sebahagian daripada ruangan hotel masih dalam proses proses renovasi.)
Bilik okay cuma sekeliling masih under renovation. Tak banyak sgt fasilities yg ada tp utk stay 1-3days should be okay.

Lokasi nya bagus, strategis... dekat kemana².. daerah dekat dengan museum tsunami dan masjid. Untuk fasilitas standard.. lemari pakaian rusak.. staf ramah tapi kinerja lambat.. sebelumnya kami sudah meminta refill tissue dan baru di anter tengah malam nya.. hotel masih pembangunan dan foto banyak desain² yg mungkin bakal jd konsep baru nnt?

Looking at the room's photo, it was exciting at first to actually be able to stay in a triple bed room. But, immediately after checking in the excitement waned.

The room is small to move around. Plus, there's no elevator and the hotel is still undergoing renovation. In conclusion, until the renovation is fully completed try not to stay here unless if there's no other place.

Understandable that we came during rainy season. But the pillow case was already mouldy with black spots. And the water heater is not working somehow. Comparing back in Pulau Weh, the hotel didn’t even charge me for the mineral water. But here they say they need to charge me. Not sure if it is the standard procedure. But overall is ok since i only stay for one day.

The hotel is doing renovation as they claimed but i believe even so, they should not taking it light on cleanliness. As you can see, my room has leaking watermark, dirty towel and dustbin. Even the water from bidet is leaking causing the floor mat to be fully wet when we arrived. The sink is clog when you use it but i did not take picture. They dont have lift (that's fine) but the staircase on level 3 is steep and does not have handle. Nothing much on the breakfast. We stayed one night so it was okay. The staff were good and helpful.

reviews.reviewTitle: Unpleasant but can work on it
reviews.reviewComments: I recently stayed at this hotel and unfortunately the experience wasn’t great. The place is still under renovation, so it felt messy and unfinished throughout the stay. However, I do want to highlight that the staff were genuinely kind and helpful, which I really appreciated. With improvements to the facilities and cleanliness, this hotel has potential, but for now, it wasn’t the most comfortable stay.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi hotel strategis.. dekat dengan mesjid baiturrahman.. kecewanya hanya pada saat minta tolong di ganti seprai, handuk dan keset kaki utk hari kedua.. yg di ganti hanya handuk saja.. utk sikat gigi yg baru tidak diberikan. Hotel ini kurang nya tidak memiliki lift.. bangunan nya ada bangunan lama dan bangunan baru. Tempatnya nyaman untuk istirahat.. staff nya membantu tamu. Rekom kalau ke banda aceh nginap disini.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel's location is strategic, close to the Baiturrahman Mosque. The only disappointment was when I requested to change the bedsheets, towels, and foot mat for the second day; only the towels were changed, and a new toothbrush was not provided. The hotel lacks an elevator. The building has both old and new structures. It's a comfortable place to rest, and the staff is helpful to guests. I recommend staying here if you visit Banda Aceh.

The shower water pressure was very slow, which made bathing uncomfortable. I also found a cockroach in the room, which was unpleasant and concerning for hygiene. Additionally, the food was quite expensive for the quality offered. Overall, the experience did not meet expectations.Even extra btl of water is chargeable i never experiance this in other place

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya masih hotel baru, fasilitasnya masih kurang, tidur di lantai atas naik tangga agak capek, masih banyak ruangan yg sedang di perbaiki atau baru di bangun
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is still new, the facilities are lacking, sleeping on the upper floor requires climbing stairs which is quite tiring, and there are still many rooms that are being repaired or newly built.
bilik berbau dan pintu toilet tidak berfusi lock problem,
Love it
Perfect location! Walking distance to all major attractions and restaurants. Great staff

The shower water pressure was very slow, which made bathing uncomfortable. I also found a cockroach in the room, which was unpleasant and concerning for hygiene. Additionally, the food was quite expensive for the quality offered.Overall, the experience did not meet expectations.This hotel is not recommended at all.Even extra water bottle is chargeble
Cleanlinesd n facilities to be improved
Staff perempuan yang pakai cermin mata tu ramah. Nice.
Penginapan sangat selesa. Breakfast sedap. Lokasi strategic hanya jalan kaki.
Good location, however terrible with no lifts operating as yet.
Mantap
Hotel baru yang bersih dan dekat dengan Masjid Agung

reviews.reviewComments: In the future, it is mandatory to come here.

reviews.reviewComments: New and well-maintained building

reviews.originalComment: Sangat cocok bagi Anda yang ingin selalu shalat jama'ah mesjid Baiturrahman
reviews.reviewComments: Very suitable for those of you who always want to pray in congregation at Baiturrahman mosque.
Staff ramah, posisi strategis, sangat direkomendasikan

reviews.originalComment: Pertama masuk kamar ada tercium bau tak sedap, kamar mandinya juga bau
reviews.reviewComments: Upon entering the room, there is an unpleasant odor, and the bathroom also smells.

reviews.originalComment: Cocok untuk menginap selanjutnya di hotel ini
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for staying next at this hotel.
Very near to Baiturahman mosque. Great stay, helpful and nice staff.

reviews.originalComment: Dekat masjid Raya Baiturohman
reviews.reviewComments: Near the Baiturohman Grand Mosque
Koneksi internet kenceng, tvnya android! Bagus!
2 kali nginep disini, deket jalan kaki ke masjid raya.

Ci siamo fermate come prima notte per logistica di viaggio per i terminal di diversi bus utili per spostamenti. La camera con tutti i confort, pulita essenziale, con piccolo frigorifero. La colazione, già possibile al mattino prestissimo é molto ricca e abbondante, spaziando da dolce e salato, local e internazionale. Consigliato!
BERBAU, TAK BEST
